headline: Arizona Ridge Riders to Announce Multi-Year Partnership with Energy Transfer at 2026 Training Camp this Weekend
summary: The Arizona Ridge Riders are set to kick off their training camp this weekend in Buckeye, Arizona ahead of the 2026 PBR Teams season with a new team sponsor. On Saturday, June 27, Arizona's bull riding team will officially announce a new multi-year partnership with Energy Transfer, one of the nation's largest energy infrastructure companies behind the planned Desert Southwest Pipeline project that will bring natural gas into the Phoenix to meet increasing demand.
